test_cases.description: Severity enum has all expected members with correct values
assertions: All five members exist: critical, high, medium, low, info
Each member's value equals its name string

test_cases.description: Severity members are str instances (StrEnum)
assertions: isinstance(member, str) is True for all members

test_cases.description: Severity raises error for invalid value lookup
Confidence enum has all expected members
Confidence members are str instances (StrEnum)
Confidence raises error for invalid value
ReviewStage has all expected members
ReviewDecision has all expected members
ClassificationLabel has all expected members
ChroniclerEventType has all expected members
LearnerPhase has all expected members
StigmergyVerb has all expected members
CliExitCode has all expected members with int values 0-3
OutputFormat has all expected members
severity_rank returns correct rank for all Severity members
severity_rank maintains strict ordering critical > high > medium > low > info
severity_rank returns int
severity_rank raises error for invalid input
assertions: Raises appropriate error for non-Severity input

test_cases.description: severity_rank returns values in [0, 4]
confidence_rank returns correct rank for all Confidence members
confidence_rank maintains strict ordering high > medium > low
confidence_rank raises error for invalid input
assertions: Raises appropriate error for non-Confidence input

test_cases.description: learner_phase_rank returns correct rank for all LearnerPhase members
assertions: Returns int ranks for shadow, canary, primary

test_cases.description: learner_phase_rank maintains ordering based on contract
learner_phase_rank raises error for invalid input
assertions: Raises appropriate error for non-LearnerPhase input

test_cases.description: validate_iso_timestamp accepts valid ISO 8601 strings
validate_iso_timestamp accepts ISO strings with timezone info
validate_iso_timestamp accepts date-only ISO strings
validate_iso_timestamp rejects non-ISO strings
validate_iso_timestamp rejects empty string
DiffHunk can be constructed with valid data
assertions: All fields are accessible and correct

test_cases.description: DiffHunk is frozen/immutable
assertions: Attribute assignment raises ValidationError or TypeError

test_cases.description: DiffHunk forbids extra fields
DiffHunk allows None for optional language field
DiffHunk survives JSON round-trip
ReviewRequest can be constructed with valid data including nested DiffHunks
assertions: All fields correct, hunks are DiffHunk instances

test_cases.description: ReviewRequest is frozen/immutable
Finding can be constructed with valid data
Finding allows None for optional line_number and suggestion
Assessment can be constructed with valid data
assertions: All fields correct, nested findings accessible

test_cases.description: TrustScore can be constructed with valid weight
TrustScore accepts weight=0.0
TrustScore accepts weight=1.0
TrustScore rejects weight below 0.0
TrustScore rejects weight above 1.0
TesseraSeal can be constructed with valid data
assertions: All fields correct, previous_hash can be None

canonical_bytes returns bytes type
canonical_bytes output is valid UTF-8 JSON
canonical_bytes returns identical bytes for same instance called twice
Two instances with same field values produce identical canonical_bytes
canonical_hash returns 64-char lowercase hex string
assertions: all(c in '0123456789abcdef' for c in result)

test_cases.description: canonical_hash equals SHA-256 of canonical_bytes
canonical_hash is deterministic for identical field values
Different model data produces different hashes
Model construction fails with missing required field
assertions: ValidationError raised when required fields missing

test_cases.description: Model construction fails with wrong type for field
_ExemplarBase has PACT_KEY class variable
Frozen models are hashable
Finding survives JSON round-trip
